Interface SourceFileRepository

All Superinterfaces:
Service
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultSourceFileRepository, KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository
public interface SourceFileRepository extends Service
Retrieval, storage and write back of abstract syntax trees.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
    Adds a progress listener for getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath(), getCompilationUnitsFromFiles(String[])and printAll(boolean).
    void
    cleanUp()
    Deletes all superfluous (renamed, detached) compilation unit files.
    DataLocation
    findSourceFile(String classname)
    Returns the location of the source file for the given class or null if the file could not be located.
    List<CompilationUnit>
    getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath()
    Retrieves all compilation units from the current search path, transitively.
    List<CompilationUnit>
    getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath(FilenameFilter filter)
    Retrieves compilation units from the current search path, as given by the filter.
    CompilationUnit
    getCompilationUnit(String classname)
    Retrieves the AST for the compilation unit containing the class with the given name.
    CompilationUnit
    getCompilationUnitFromFile(String filename)
    Retrieves the abstract syntax tree for the compilation unit within the specified file.
    List<CompilationUnit>
    getCompilationUnits()
    Returns the list of compilation unit in the project.
    List<CompilationUnit>
    getCompilationUnitsFromFiles(String[] filenames)
    Calls getCompilationUnitFromFile(String)for all given file names.
    List<CompilationUnit>
    getKnownCompilationUnits()
    Returns the current list of compilation unit in the repository.
    boolean
    isUpToDate(CompilationUnit cu)
    Checks if the given compilation unit is up to date or if it has changed after the last persistant state.
    void
    print(CompilationUnit cu)
    Print back the compilation unit to it's data location.
    void
    printAll(boolean always)
    Print back all compilation units to their data locations.
    void
    removeProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
    Removes the given progress listener.

    Methods inherited from interface Service

    getServiceConfiguration, initialize

  • Method Details

    • getCompilationUnits

      List<CompilationUnit> getCompilationUnits()
      Returns the list of compilation unit in the project. This call may trigger an update.

    • getKnownCompilationUnits

      List<CompilationUnit> getKnownCompilationUnits()
      Returns the current list of compilation unit in the repository.

    • findSourceFile

      DataLocation findSourceFile(String classname)
      Returns the location of the source file for the given class or null if the file could not be located.
      Parameters:
      classname - the name of the class for which the source should be located.
      Returns:
      the source file location.

    • getCompilationUnit

      CompilationUnit getCompilationUnit(String classname)
      Retrieves the AST for the compilation unit containing the class with the given name. This method will not throw ParserExceptions, but pass these to the system error handler.
      Parameters:
      classname - the fully qualified classname of the required class.
      Returns:
      the AST for that class, if sources are available, null otherwise.

    • getCompilationUnitFromFile

      CompilationUnit getCompilationUnitFromFile(String filename) throws ParserException
      Retrieves the abstract syntax tree for the compilation unit within the specified file. The service guarantees not to retrieve two different syntax trees for the same location. The given filename may also be absolute - it will then be shortened if a prefix is in the search path, or used to load the file regardless of the search path, otherwise.
      Parameters:
      filename - the name of the file to look for
      Returns:
      a compilation unit object for that file, or null if there was no unit under this name whatoever.
      Throws:
      ParserException - if something happened while parsing.

    • getCompilationUnitsFromFiles

      List<CompilationUnit> getCompilationUnitsFromFiles(String[] filenames) throws ParserException
      Calls getCompilationUnitFromFile(String)for all given file names.
      Parameters:
      filenames - the names of the files to look for.
      Returns:
      a list of all available compilation units for the given files.
      Throws:
      ParserException - if something happened while parsing.
      Since:
      0.72

    • getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath

      List<CompilationUnit> getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath() throws ParserException
      Retrieves all compilation units from the current search path, transitively. This is useful to create a closed world, but assumes that all subdirectories of the search path belong to the project.
      Returns:
      the list of all compilation units accessible via the search path.
      Throws:
      ParserException

    • getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath

      List<CompilationUnit> getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath(FilenameFilter filter) throws ParserException
      Retrieves compilation units from the current search path, as given by the filter. The algorithm checks all files in all subdirectories, but this can be narrowed down in the filter.
      Parameters:
      filter - a filename filter accepting source files.
      Returns:
      the list of all compilation units obeying the filter and accessible via the search path.
      Throws:
      ParserException

    • isUpToDate

      boolean isUpToDate(CompilationUnit cu)
      Checks if the given compilation unit is up to date or if it has changed after the last persistant state.
      Parameters:
      cu - a compilation unit.
      Returns:
      true if the compilation unit does not have to be written back.

    • print

      void print(CompilationUnit cu) throws IOException
      Print back the compilation unit to it's data location. If the compilation unit is still at its original location, apply the filename mapper.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • printAll

      void printAll(boolean always) throws IOException
      Print back all compilation units to their data locations. Can be used to print all units, or only those that are not up to date.
      Parameters:
      always - flag to indicate whether all units should be written back ( true), or only these which are not up to date ( false).
      Throws:
      IOException
      See Also:
      • print(CompilationUnit)
      • isUpToDate(CompilationUnit)

    • cleanUp

      void cleanUp()
      Deletes all superfluous (renamed, detached) compilation unit files. Does not remove source files from other sources.

    • addProgressListener

      void addProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
      Adds a progress listener for getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath(), getCompilationUnitsFromFiles(String[])and printAll(boolean).
      Parameters:
      l - a progress listener.
      Since:
      0.72

    • removeProgressListener

      void removeProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
      Removes the given progress listener.
      Parameters:
      l - a progress listener.
      Since:
      0.72
